tweaks.name: Hide Dock
tweaks.description: Hides the dock background on the home screen. Warning: this also hides any app icons placed in the dock — move them to the home screen grid before applying. Respring to restore.
tweaks.author: @MinePlayer16

tweaks.name: Hide Home Bar
tweaks.description: Zeros the MaterialKit home-indicator asset page using Cyanide's stable file-page zero path. Respring after applying so SpringBoard refreshes the asset cache. Credits: C4ndyF1sh/ZeroCalories and jailbreakdotparty/dirtyZero.
tweaks.author: zeroxjf

tweaks.name: Dock Color
tweaks.description: Colors the dock background/platter with a custom color. Uses guarded iOS 26+ and legacy dock paths.
tweaks.author: @MinePlayer16

tweaks.name: Hide Search Pill
tweaks.description: Hides the home-screen search pill using iOS 26+ scroll accessory paths with legacy fallback scanning.
tweaks.author: @MinePlayer16

tweaks.name: Floating Icons
tweaks.description: Adds gentle floating animations to home-screen and dock icon layers. Configurable movement, rotation, and scale.
tweaks.author: @MinePlayer16

tweaks.name: Dump Views
tweaks.description: Diagnostic helper that waits, dumps visible SpringBoard window view trees to /tmp, and opens a share sheet when possible.
tweaks.author: @MinePlayer16
